name: Sourdough French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a mixing bowl and combine thoroughly.
3. Knead the dough lightly and let it rise until doubled in size.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured board and divide into two equal parts.
5. Shape each part into an oblong form, then roll them up tightly starting on one side.
6. Seal the outside edge by pinching and shape into the desired size.
7. Place loaves on greased baking sheets and let rise until doubled again.
8. Make diagonal cuts across the top of the loaves using a razor blade or very sharp knife.
9. Brush lightly with water for a crisp crust.
10. Bake at 400 degrees F for about 25 minutes, or until brown and cooked through.
Note: This recipe makes 2 loaves, each yielding approximately 18 slices. Serving sizes are approximate and may vary based on personal preference.
